evidence.source_title: MRI-based image-guided adaptive brachytherapy for locally advanced cervical cancer in clinical routine: a single-institution experience.
evidence.raw_snippet:
PubMed ID: 40376012. 2025/05/01 00:00. BACKGROUND: MRI-based image-guided adaptive brachytherapy (IGABT) is a new 
approach for individual dose escalation and control of organ at risk (OAR) doses 
and toxicities in the treatment of locally advanced cervical cancer.
METHODS: Various radiotherapy-related parameters and the feasibility of the 
treatment based on acute toxicity were analyzed in a total of 50 cases in two 
cohorts who received a brachytherapy (BT) boost after definitive 
chemoradioth
